title: selaginella deflexa
intro: Selaginella deflexa, also known as Spiny Clubmoss, is a species of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. The health benefits of Selaginella deflexa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. In traditional herbal medicine, Selaginella deflexa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in topical creams and ointments to harness its therapeutic benefits.
